static_ui_docs: Check affected HTML/CSS/docs render or read correctly.
Confirm links and simple navigation still work.
normal_web_app: Run available unit tests or the smallest relevant smoke check.
Verify forms, dashboards, or reports still preserve expected inputs and outputs.
Check related API contract assumptions without broad backend changes.
forge_bot: Run Python parse check on touched bot scripts.
Confirm no secrets, env values, __pycache__, or generated files are included.
live_prod_forge_bot: Run Python parse check on touched bot scripts.
Confirm no secrets, env values, __pycache__, or generated files are included.
Include a rollback note and keep the diff narrow.
laserfiche_integration: Run syntax or lint checks available for the touched language.
Confirm Laserfiche endpoint or document contract is preserved.
Use sanitized fixtures only; do not include credentials or PII.
teamdynamix_integration: Confirm TeamDynamix request and response contract is preserved.
Use mocked or sanitized payloads only.
Verify no bearer token or production ticket content is included.
microsoft_graph_cybersecurity: Confirm Microsoft Graph or Advanced Hunting query shape is preserved.
Use sanitized IDs and sample payloads only.
Check Intune/security-control assumptions with a human reviewer.
public_official_budget_content: Do not invent numbers or publish unverified claims.
Check affected generated pages or exports.
sensitive_intake_or_claims: Run available syntax, lint, or unit checks.
Confirm no PII, PHI, legal records, veteran records, or claim details are included.
infrastructure_network_security: Validate config syntax with the safest available local check.
Require human review before touching live infrastructure.
